title: Three Norwegian brothers arrested over US embassy blast in Oslo
summary_full: Trio held on suspicion of ‘terrorist bombing’ that caused minor damage but no injuriesThree Norwegian brothers have been arrested on suspicion of a “terrorist bombing” at the US embassy in Oslo that caused minor damage at the weekend but no injuries.The police prosecutor Christian Hatlo told a press conference that the brothers, who were Norwegian citizens of Iraqi origin, had been arrested in Oslo and that police were investigating the motive. Continue reading...
